description_long: This helicopter features a stylized, angular design with a predominantly blue and black color scheme accented by orange elements. The main body is faceted and geometric, with a blue nose and tail section, and a black central fuselage. Two long, straight rotor blades extend from the top, appearing dark gray or black. The tail section is sharply tapered, and the helicopter has two orange, triangular structures resembling stabilizers or stylized tail fins. The landing gear is not traditional skids but rather angular, black geometric shapes that support the body. The cockpit area is integrated into the blue front section, with no clearly defined windows or doors visible.
description: A stylized, angular blue and black helicopter with long rotor blades and orange accents, featuring a geometric body and abstract landing supports.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue nose, orange accents, and the symmetrical spread of the long black rotor blades.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the faceted blue body, black central fuselage, and the angular orange tail fin, with the rotor mast visible on top.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the tapered blue tail, black fuselage, and the symmetrical orange tail fins, with both rotor blades extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the blue body, black fuselage, and the other orange tail fin, with the rotor mast and blades visible.
attribute_rotor_blades: Two long, straight main rotor blades, black or dark gray, with a simple, flat profile and no visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: Not visible; no distinct tail rotor is apparent in any view.
attribute_landing_skids: No traditional skids; instead, angular black geometric supports are present beneath the fuselage.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Not visible; the cockpit area is integrated into the blue front section with no distinct window outlines.
